# Contributing to Agent Magnet

## Branch Protection Rules

- **All changes must go through a Pull Request.** Direct commits to `main` are not allowed.
- **PRs require at least 1 review approval** from [@helinakdogan](https://github.com/helinakdogan) before merging.
- **Every PR must be linked to an open issue.** Reference the issue in your PR description (e.g. `Closes #42`).

## CLA

Before your first contribution is merged, you must sign the [Contributor License Agreement](../CLA.md) by commenting on the PR:

```
I have read the CLA document and I hereby sign the CLA.
```
